evidence.shareholders: Shareholders, Board of Commissioners and Direksi Directors PT Benteng Api Technic Tbk PT Benteng Api Technic Tbk Opini Opinion Kami telah mengaudit laporan keuangan We have audited the consolidated financial konsolidasian PT Benteng Api Technic Tbk dan statements of PT Benteng Api Technic Tbk and its Entitas Anak (‘’Grup‘’), yang terdiri dari laporan posisi Subsidiary (the ‘’Group‘’), which comprise the keuangan konsolidasian tanggal 31 Desember 2024 consolidated statement of financial position as of serta laporan laba rugi dan penghasilan December 31, 2024 and the consolidated komprehensif lain konsolidasian, laporan perubahan statement of profit or loss and other ekuitas konsolidasian dan laporan arus kas comprehensive income, consolidated statement of konsolidasian untuk tahun yang berakhir pada changes in equity and consolidated statement of tanggal tersebut, serta catatan atas laporan cash flows for the year then ended, and notes to keuangan konsolidasian, termasuk informasi the consolidated financial statements, including kebijakan akuntansi material. material accounting policy information. Menurut opini kami, laporan keuangan konsolidasian In our opinion, the accompanying consolidated terlampir menyajikan secara wajar, dalam semua hal financial statement present fairly, in all material yang material, posisi keuangan konsolidasian Grup respects, the consolidated financial position of konsolidasian tanggal 31 Desember 2024, serta the Group December 31, 2024, and consolidated kinerja keuangan konsolidasian dan arus kas financial performance and its consolidated cash konsolidasian untuk tahun yang berakhir pada flows for the year ended, in accordance with tanggal tersebut, sesuai dengan Standar Akuntansi Indonesian Financial Accounting Standards. Keuangan di Indonesia. Basis Opini Basis for Opinion Kami melaksanakan audit kami berdasarkan Standar We conducted our audit in accordance with Audit yang ditetapkan oleh Institut Akuntan Publik Standards on Auditing established by the Indonesia. Tanggung jawab kami menurut standar Indonesian Institute of Certified Public tersebut diuraikan lebih lanjut dalam paragraf Accountants. Our responsibilities under those Tanggung Jawab Auditor terhadap Audit atas standards are further described in the Auditors’ Laporan Keuangan Konsolidasian pada laporan Responsibilities for the Audit of the Consolidated kami. Kami independen terhadap Grup berdasarkan Financial Statements paragraph of our report. We ketentuan etika yang relevan dalam audit kami atas are independent of the Group in accordance with laporan keuangan konsolidasian di Indonesia, dan the ethical requirements that are relevant to our kami telah memenuhi tanggung jawab etika lainnya audit of the consolidated financial statements in berdasarkan ketentuan tersebut. Kami yakin bahwa Indonesia, and we have fulfilled our other ethical bukti audit yang telah kami peroleh adalah cukup dan responsibilities in accordance with these tepat untuk menyediakan suatu basis bagi opini audit requirements. We believe that the audit evidence kami. we have obtained is sufficient and appropriate to provide a basis for our opinion.
